title: ChannelProfile
description: ChannelProfile: C-shaped profile with parallel flanges of the same length and thickness.

Height.description: Full depth between the extreme fibres of the parallel flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

FlangeWidth.description: Full width between the extreme fibres of the web to the flange. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

WebThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

FlangeThickness.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

RootRadius.description: Fillet radius between inner face of the flanges and the inner face of web. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

ToeRadius.description: Fillet radius at the end of the flanges. Value need to be smaller or equal than the flange thickness. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

MirrorAboutLocalZ.description: If true, the section is mirrored about its local z-axis, resulting in a backwards facing C-shape.

Edges.description: Edge curves that matches the dimensions in the global XY-plane.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
